overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through downtown Los Santos during sunset. The character navigates brick-paved intersections, palm-lined sidewalks, and crosses multi-lane streets while passing urban landmarks including a FLEECA bank and a classical courthouse building.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with bank building and brick paving

events.description: character runs across the brick-paved intersection toward the FLEECA bank corner
turns left onto the sidewalk alongside the glass-windowed building

agents.ego_description: sprinting across the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk past the bank building

entered.detail: corner building with green FLEECA signage and closed shutters
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
red brick crosswalk and road surface at the intersection
tall glass office tower visible in the distance against the sunset
long building facade with reflective dark glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character running across a brick-paved urban intersection during golden hour. The FLEECA bank building dominates the right side while a modern skyscraper rises in the distance. The character turns left onto a sidewalk alongside a building with reflective glass windows, passing a street trash can as the sun casts long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined city street with parked vehicles

events.description: character passes parked orange convertible and continues running along the sidewalk
approaching large intersection with classical courthouse building becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the palm-lined sidewalk, passing parked cars and approaching the large intersection

entered.detail: bright orange convertible sports car parked at the curb
gray jeep-style SUV parked behind the orange convertible
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk against the sunset sky
large stone building with columns and classical architecture visible ahead
tall construction crane silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees on the right and parked vehicles on the left. The orange convertible and gray SUV are prominent parked cars. As the character progresses, the downtown skyline opens up ahead with a classical courthouse building and a construction crane becoming visible against the warm sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with classical courthouse and crosswalk

events.description: character turns left and begins crossing the wide multi-lane intersection
crossing in front of stopped traffic at red light while a woman walks on the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning left to cross the wide intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk past a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: woman walking on the sidewalk while talking on a cell phone

entered.detail: concrete block retaining wall with stone cap along the elevated sidewalk
large overhead highway sign structure spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to cross a wide sunlit intersection, with the classical courthouse building now prominent on the right. The sun creates a strong backlight effect as the character crosses the asphalt. After crossing, the character passes a woman talking on her phone and continues along a sidewalk bordered by a highway retaining wall, with an overhead sign gantry visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk next to highway approach with retaining walls

events.description: approaching intersection with green traffic light and other pedestrians crossing ahead
character crosses the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: running along the elevated sidewalk and crossing the intersection with other pedestrians visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: older red brick industrial building visible across the highway
large commercial truck with colorful billboard advertisement on the side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running along an elevated concrete sidewalk bordered by a retaining wall on the right and a multi-lane highway on the left. A billboard truck passes by on the road below. The character approaches an intersection where other pedestrians are crossing, then crosses the street at the crosswalk as the traffic light shows green, with modern glass towers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that transitions from narrow brick-paved intersections to an open highway corridor under a golden sunset. It begins with the character sprinting across a brick intersection past a FLEECA bank and a distant skyscraper, turning left onto a sidewalk with reflective glass windows and long shadows. As the character continues, the scene opens up along a palm-lined concrete path flanked by parked cars, revealing a classical courthouse and a construction crane against the warm sky. The camera then follows a left turn across a wide, backlit asphalt intersection and past a pedestrian, shifting toward a sidewalk bordered by a highway retaining wall and an overhead sign gantry. Finally, the movement leads along an elevated concrete walkway above a multi-lane highway where a billboard truck passes, ending as the character crosses a green-lit street toward distant glass towers.
